entries.title: Authority Definition Lifecycle Clarity
entries.summary: The dispatch answered the reader-facing authority question: "How do we know Economy Resilience is the right definition?" The accepted answer is deliberately demoted: this repository does **not** know that ER-D1 is right in the strong sense.
residue: ER-D1 still needs actual witnesses or typed negatives for each conjunct.

entries.title: Bets & Prizes — a falsification-first mechanism generator
entries.summary: A standalone research device that turns the tower from a precedent cataloguer into a generator of **candidate economic mechanisms that have survived attack**.
residue: Nothing is awarded.

entries.title: CAv2 Authority/Lifecycle Owned-Build Harvest
entries.summary: The authority/lifecycle harvest closed with a FIX verdict and no CRITICAL findings.
residue: Fixture contracts remain open for contribution-edge, reviewer bottleneck, attention-credit feedback, appeal/recusal, and authority-handoff no-effect scenarios.

entries.title: CAv2/Lean Development Pack Review
entries.summary: The review dispatch accepted a FIX verdict for the CAv2/Lean findings development pack.

entries.title: CAv2 And Lean Findings
entries.summary: The accepted harvest findings resolve the CAv2/Lean harvest dispatch as local research controls.
residue: External DAO, behavioral, mechanism-design, legal/tax, wallet/security, privacy, and science-credit evidence remains open bridge work.

entries.title: CAv2/Lean Findings Development Pack
entries.summary: This entry points to the refinement handoff that converts the 14 accepted CAv2/Lean harvest controls into canonical local definitions, design shapes, non-executed plan threads, and blocked escalations.
residue: External DAO, behavioral, mechanism-design, legal/tax, wallet/security, privacy, governance, and science-credit evidence remains open bridge work.

entries.title: CAv2 And Lean Selector Map
entries.summary: The selector map is the reviewer-revised synthesis from the CAv2 and DomainSpec Lean harvest.
residue: The map does not validate a mechanism.

entries.title: Contribution-Edge Fixture Full Refine Plan
entries.summary: The CAv2 authority/lifecycle output has a full dispatch-spec validated Refine packet for the next safe implementation surface: `validation/contribution-edge-fixtures/`.

entries.title: Contribution-Edge Fixtures
entries.summary: The contribution-edge fixture package has been materialized under `validation/contribution-edge-fixtures/`.

entries.title: Contribution Measurement, Failure, Review, and Allocation Guide

entries.title: Current-State Mental Map
entries.summary: A self-contained visual read model now separates the program's source and authority foundation, closed research, candidate handoffs, killed propositions, unrun or unrunnable evidence work, human decisions, and the smallest legitimate next contributions.
residue: The page is a dated projection and must be refreshed when dispatch, definition, institutional-input, experiment, bet/prize, adjudication, or promotion state changes.

entries.title: Deferred Contribution Basis Research
entries.summary: Deferred Contribution Basis Research
residue: - Definition/non-drift is blocked before fixture use: the relevance claim, review disposition, and result-link evidence class are unregistered.

entries.title: DomainSpec Subagents Reflection Loop
entries.summary: The DomainSpec subagents strategy now has a local reflection loop.
residue: The current report is a manual reflection over a small signal set.

entries.title: Economy-Resilience Program — Towers + Synthesis + Start Path
entries.summary: A meta multi-tower research program for the ResonantOS / ResonantDAO economy.
residue: Nothing is validated — the four fixtures are validation-*ready*, not validated.

entries.title: Repository-Ergonomics Strategy — towers + synthesis
entries.summary: Diagnosis (all three personas converged): the repo has one strong automation (the dispatch appender) and **hand-maintains every other projection** (inventory index, tag register, CRAFT status, term scan), so they **drift invisibly** — `index.json` is stale right now (19 of 21 entries, `by_tag` empty
residue: **Decisions resolved 2026-06-29** (decision-gate: #18 tier-gate · #5 new validator · #19 posture-mirror-only · #17 build stub; see [authority/decisions/2026-06-29-ergonomics-open-decisions.md](../../../authority/decisions/2026-06-29-ergonomics-open-decisions.md)).

entries.title: Harvest Strategy
entries.summary: The harvest strategy defined a narrow first research dispatch for extracting CyberAlchemy v2 method authority and DomainSpec Lean formalization discipline into local ResonantOS economy selectors before the broad economy fan-out runs.
residue: The first harvest did not close external evidence, behavior, legal, privacy, anti-gaming, or workflow-witness gaps.

entries.title: Load-Bearing Term Tracking Discipline (session synthesis)
entries.summary: Load-Bearing Term Tracking Discipline (session synthesis)
residue: Five flagged items remain non-definitions: `$REX/$REX-COM` (un-sourced subagent artifact → tower owner), `cartel` (deferred to MERGE-3), `submonoid`/`absorbing` (analogy-only), `emission_rate` (subsumed).

entries.title: Local Source Snapshots
entries.summary: The repository now contains local snapshots of the CAv2 Evidence Exchange, CAv2 authority/promotion sources, and selected DomainSpec Lean formalization sources required for the first harvest.
residue: The first harvest distilled these snapshots into `harvest/cav2-lean/selector-map.md` and `harvest/cav2-lean/findings.md`.

entries.title: Mechanism-Directed Prior Art
entries.summary: Every proposed mechanism routes a directed and bounded question into each relevant subtower before its witness design is treated as ready.
residue: - The five deferred-contribution returns are worked examples, not a universal proof that every future mechanism needs those same five subtowers.

entries.title: Monetary Circulation And Liquidity Resilience Tower
entries.summary: Monetary Circulation And Liquidity Resilience Tower

entries.title: Number Lottery Refinement
entries.summary: Number Lottery Refinement
residue: - Research closure does not validate cryptography, confidentiality, unique-human participation, consent, fairness, behavioral engagement, governance, or token economics.

entries.title: Onboarding-Docs Review — README/GUIDE/CONTRIBUTING red-team
entries.summary: Three docs are posture-faithful but the edit session left **16 verified findings**: **2 CRITICAL** (README "auditor ACCEPT" invented vs ledger; README links + leans on gitignored/purged `sources/local-snapshots/`), **8 MAJOR** (start-path pointer targets the wrong file; no single authoritative onboa
residue: **Change requests applied 2026-06-29** (all 16 + the consistency spillovers found on apply): edits to `README.md`, `GUIDE.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `AGENTS.md`, the inventory index, and the four external subtower headers (`scaffolded` → `first-pass returns present`).

entries.title: Repo Skill Surface
entries.summary: The repository exposes selected Arcanum skills for inventory, context building, research towers, evidence harnessing, authority routing, and publication research, sigil lifecycle maintenance, workflow reflection, plus prefixed DomainSpec dispatch skills.
residue: No personal/global skill installation was changed; this is a repo-local skill surface.

entries.title: Repository Onboarding and Experiment Literacy
entries.summary: The accepted research finds that core onboarding and experiment mechanics already exist, while the claim that discovery and example variation are the primary newcomer difficulty remains unwitnessed and therefore killed at claim level.
residue: - Newcomer difficulty being primarily discovery/variation is killed until an unaided audience diagnostic exists.

entries.title: Repository Working Guide
entries.summary: The repository working guide defines the local posture for work in this tower: source-kind separation, signal-credit-authority separation, witness-first mechanism evaluation, visible residue, private/internal consultation posture, and the continuation route after the first harvests and fixture scaff
residue: The guide is current for internal continuation, but public release still requires a dedicated scrub and derivative package.

entries.title: Research Tower Root
entries.summary: Root tower for researching a resilient ResonantOS / ResonantDAO contribution economy.
residue: The first economy invariant, first workflow witness, and first validation harness are still open.

entries.title: Strategy Result - CAv2 And Lean Harvest
entries.summary: The CAv2 and DomainSpec Lean harvest strategy was a gated research dispatch.
residue: The findings leave open external DAO, behavioral, mechanism-design, legal/tax, wallet/security, privacy, governance, science-credit, and concrete workflow witness evidence.

entries.title: Strategy Result - Four-Surface Reconciliation
entries.summary: A research dispatch triggered by the user's suspicion that the reader-facing vocabulary surfaces — `glossary/GLOSSARY.md`, `NOTATION.md`, `distills/DISTILLED-KNOWLEDGE.md` — "were not done correctly." Scoped to two defect classes the user confirmed: **out-of-sync surfaces** and **coverage gaps** aga
residue: The 9 owner-gated disputes (candidate invariants awaiting fixtures/values, orphaned entries, mis-typed gate-vs-fixture items) remain open and route to the authority/promotion lane, not the surface pass.

entries.title: Subagents Dispatch Strategy
entries.summary: The repository has a local DomainSpec subagent dispatch stack.
residue: The CAv2/Lean harvest dispatch is closed with accepted local findings.

entries.title: Telemetry Agent Pool
entries.summary: The repository has a local agent-name pool for future governed dispatches.
residue: The pool is small and should be expanded only when a dispatch or reflection loop needs a new role fit.

entries.title: Time Capsule Live Intake Refine
entries.summary: A full Refine run converted the existing Time Capsule candidate design into a non-executed form/database/safety implementation plan.
